calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk: Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Susan Dahi, is present.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Christopher Fry, is present.
Attorney, Ryan Anderson, appearing for the defendants through limited scope.

Defendant, Jason Fry, is not present.
(A Default was entered against the defendant on 10/21/08)

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 148 A Clinton Parl, San Francisco, CA. The trial date is vacated.
